title: Godrej Interio Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Floor Manager (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Godrej Interio Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Floor Manager (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Godrej Interio Asia Pacific Associates is actively seeking a talented and motivated Floor Manager to join our dynamic team in Nashik. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Godrej Interio Asia Pacific Associates:
Godrej Interio Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Godrej Interio Asia Pacific Associates!
